_publications._publicationTitle: Functional interactions between neurofibromatosis tumor suppressors underlie Schwann cell tumor de-differentiation and treatment resistance.

_contextSnippet: Datasets were integrated using Harmony, and uniform manifold approximation and projection (UMAP) revealed a total of 18 cell clusters
details: Successfully integrated datasets from single-nuclear RNA sequencing, enabling UMAP analysis that revealed 18 cell clusters and 3 tumor cell clusters in allograft samples
